card.name: Moira X
card.desc: When Destroyed: Get a copy of your opening hand.

card.name: Mole Man
card.desc: On Reveal: Banish the top card of your deck. Add 2 Rocks to your hand. Set their Power to the banished card’s Cost.

card.name: Monstro
card.desc: This card’s cost is reduced by the cost of your deck’s top card.

card.name: Moondragon
card.desc:
End of Turn: +2 Power if you played 1 card this turn and spent
all your Energy.

card.name: Moonstone
card.desc: Ongoing: Has the Ongoing effects of your 3-Cost or less cards here.

card.name: Morgan le Fay
card.desc:
On Reveal: Return all your discarded and destroyed cards to hand
with +3 Power.

card.name: Mother Askani
card.desc:
On Reveal: Give the leftmost card in your hand +2 Power and -1 Cost,
then copy it.

card.name: Muse
card.desc:
Ongoing: +3 Power for each location where one of your cards has
 been destroyed.

card.name: Namorita
card.desc: When you draw a card, give it -1 Cost if this is your only card here.

card.name: Nicholas Scratch
card.desc: After you play a skill, +1 Power.

card.name: Nightmare
card.desc: On Reveal: Replace the text of each card in your hand with text from a random card of the same Cost.

card.name: Nova Frankie Raye
card.desc:
After the next time you play a
6-Cost card, double this card's Power.

card.name: Omega Sentinel
card.desc:
Activate: Afflict the
highest-Power enemy card
with -7 Power.

card.name: Ozymandias
card.desc:
Ongoing: Your Rocks have
+3 Power.

card.name: Peni Parker
card.desc:
On Reveal: Add SP//dr to your hand.
When this merges, you get
+1 Energy next turn.

card.name: Polaris Horseman of Pestilence
card.desc: Objective: Cards in play are afflicted with -5 Power  Put a card from your hand here. (0/5)

card.name: Prodigy
card.desc: On Reveal: If this is in the back row, copy the text of the card in front of it.

card.name: Prowler
card.desc: On Reveal: Add 2 Thief’s Tools to your hand. Set their Costs to 0 if a card moved last turn.

card.name: Punisher War Machine
card.desc:
When drawn, mark one of your empty locations.
 Objective: Win that location 
 +1 Max Energy.

card.name: Quicksand
card.desc:
The next time your opponent would start a turn with bonus Energy,
they don't get it.

card.name: Rama-Tut
card.desc:
On Reveal: Use {card.ModifiedCardCount} On Reveals from cards released before
{card.Name}'s time.

card.name: Red Shift
card.desc: On Reveal: Discard the leftmost card in your hand to add a random card with the same Cost to your hand.

card.name: Redwing
card.desc: The first time this moves, add a card from your hand to the old location.

card.name: Rocket and Groot
card.desc:
Moveable once.
After your opponent plays a card here, steal 1 Power from it.

card.name: Sam Wilson Captain America
card.desc:
On Reveal: Add Cap's Shield to another location.
Ongoing: Cap's Shield is Moveable.

card.name: Sandstorm
card.desc:
On Reveal: Add 2 Rocks to your hand. Give them +1 Power for each
of your front-Row characters.

card.name: Selene Horseman of Famine
card.desc: Objective: Have 3 cards with no abilities in play  Steal 5 Power from an enemy card here. (0/3)

card.name: Shadowlands Daredevil
card.desc:
On Reveal: Shuffle in 3 Demons.
When you draw a card with 6 or
 more Power, +2 Power.

card.name: Shang-Chi, Master of the Rings
card.desc:
Game Start: The Ten Rings
starts in your hand.
On Reveal: Unlock their potential.

card.name: Shou-Lao the Undying
card.desc: On Reveal: Give the last character you played +2 Power for each turn you played 2 or more cards. (+0)

card.name: Silver Surfer First Steps
card.desc: End of Turn: If you're winning this location with an On Reveal card, copy its text.

card.name: Sparky
card.desc:
Activate: Give your card that last moved +2 Power and move it
back to its previous location.

card.name: Spider-Man Brand New Day
card.desc:
Moveable twice.
After this moves to a location, give one of your other cards there +1 Power. (even unrevealed ones)

card.name: Spider-Man Noir
card.desc: On Reveal: Set the top card of your deck's Power to 8. If your other cards in play cost exactly 8 total, add it here. (0/8)

card.name: Spider-Punk
card.desc:
Moveable once.
When this moves to a location, steal 2 Power from the highest-Power enemy there.

card.name: Star-Lord, Master of the Sun
card.desc: On Reveal: Next turn, you get +1 Energy for each turn you've ended with unspent Energy.

card.name: Starbrand
card.desc: Ongoing: Your opponent has +3 Power at each other location.

card.name: Stardust
card.desc:
Ongoing: Cards can’t be added to locations except by playing
or moving them.

card.name: Starhawk
card.desc: On Reveal: +1 Power to your cards at the left location if it's an odd turn, otherwise give to the right location.

card.name: Stick
card.desc: On Reveal: Give the next card you play Power equal to this card's Power.

card.name: Storm Horseman of Famine
card.desc: Objective: End 2 turns in a row with unspent Energy  Give your other cards here and in your hand +2 Power. (0/2)

card.name: Strange Supreme
card.desc:
Gains +2 Power from merging.
End of Turn: Merge one of your created cards into this.

card.name: Sub-Mariner
card.desc:
When this is Empowered, add a random
1-Cost character to your hand with that same increase. (if in hand or in play)

card.name: Super-Adaptoid
card.desc: On Reveal: Steal the text from an enemy Activate card here.

card.name: Superior Spider-Man
card.desc: At the start of each turn, you get +1 Energy if you have any cards with increased Power in play.

card.name: Surge
card.desc: On Reveal: Give the top card of your deck -1 Cost and +1 Power. After you play it, repeat this ability.

card.name: Sword of Fu Xi
card.desc: Ongoing: If Lin Lie Iron Fist is here, he has +8 Power.

card.name: Techno-Organic Virus
card.desc:
On Reveal: Infect your other
cards here (replace their text).
Copy this to your hand.

card.name: Terrax the Tamer
card.desc: On Reveal: For each location, shuffle a Rock into the losing player's deck.

card.name: Thaddeus Ross
card.desc:
End of Turn: If your opponent has unspent Energy, draw a card with
10 or more Power.

card.name: The Ancient One
card.desc: On Reveal: Add Tao Mandala to your hand.

card.name: The Fallen One
card.desc: On Reveal: Set your Max Energy equal to this card's Power.

card.name: The First Ghost Rider
card.desc: On Reveal: Discard the lowest-Power card from your hand. Remove that card's Power from this.

card.name: The Hunger
card.desc: On Reveal: Horde +3.

card.name: The Ten Rings
card.desc: On Reveal: Give one of your other cards here +1 Power.

card.name: The Thing First Steps
card.desc: End of Turn: +2 Power. Once per game, if your side here is full, destroy an enemy card here with less Power.

card.name: Topaz
card.desc: After you play a card here, move it to the middle location.

card.name: Toxie Doxie
card.desc: On Reveal: Give 2 characters in your hand +2 Power. You can't play them next turn.

card.name: Triton
card.desc:
On Reveal: Give the last character EACH player played last turn
+3 Power.

card.name: Venus
card.desc:
When your cards in play are Empowered, give those cards
an additional +1 Power.

card.name: Victoria Hand
card.desc: Ongoing: Your cards that were created in your hand have +2 Power.

card.name: Wade Wilson
card.desc: When Destroyed: Replace this with a 1-Cost card from your hand or deck with +2 Power.

card.name: Warlock
card.desc: Activate: For each unspent Energy, give a card in your hand -1 Cost.

card.name: Weapon H
card.desc: When Discarded: Put this back with -2 Cost.

card.name: Weapon X Wolverine
card.desc: After one of your other cards is destroyed, +1 Power. After every 3rd time, improve this effect by 1. (0/3)

card.name: Web Sling
card.desc: On Reveal: Next turn, one of your cards here is Moveable and gets +1 Power when it moves. (your choice)

card.name: Wild Child
card.desc: Ongoing: +4 Power if you’ve discarded a card. +4 Power if one of your cards has been destroyed.

card.name: Wilson Fisk
card.desc: Costs 3 if you have the highest Power among cards in play.

card.name: Wolverine Horseman of War
card.desc: Objective: This has 5 or more Power  Give one of your cards at each location +4 Power. (3/5)

card.name: Xorn
card.desc: After ANY 3 or 4-Cost card is played here, move it to another location.

card.name: Zombie Captain Marvel
card.desc: Activate: Destroy your other cards here to get +3 Power for each. Move to a location you're losing.

card.name: Zombie Galacti
card.desc:
Game Start: Choose 6 other characters
in your deck.
On Reveal: Transform those cards
into copies of this.

card.name: Zombie Giant-Man
card.desc: On Reveal: Horde +2, then this gains Power equal to your Zombie Horde.

card.name: Zombie Mister Fantastic
card.desc:
On Reveal: Horde +2.
Activate: Give 4 of your created cards +1 Power.

card.name: Zombie Power Man
card.desc:
End of Turn: If you're winning here, discard the leftmost card
from your hand.

card.name: Zombie Scarlet Witch
card.desc: After you play a card here, Horde +2.

card.name: Zombie Sentry
card.desc: On Reveal: Horde +1 for each of your cards at the right location.
